question: For the quarterly data platform, which statement is a valid conclusion from the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q3 has the highest total number of platform interactions because its bar reaches the highest point on the chart.
options.B: The chart allows us to determine the quarter with the highest absolute number of complaints received.
options.C: Within each quarter, the percentage of complaints received can be compared to the percentages of searches and advertisement clicks.
options.D: Because each bar reaches 100%, all three metrics must have the same absolute values in every quarter.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
